title: Bedwars Addon for Bare Bones
description: 1.8.9 pack for Bedwars sweats to add on to Bare Bones (better fps + skill trust)
body: This pack is for Bedwars players who appreciate the Bare Bones aesthetic but would like the features found in most texture packs designed for Bedwars; it includes short swords, custom wool & concrete textures, destruction animation, armor & item textures, transparent / minimalistic dark UI, etc. Please join the Discord server if you have any feedback - I plan to continue updating and evolving the texture pack to fit everybody's needs!
